---
name: bc-design-components
description: "List available BC Government Design System components. Use when asked what components exist, which component to use for a UI pattern, or for BC Design System component documentation URLs."
---

# BC Gov Component Library

Present the full component library table from the agent's cached knowledge, grouped by category:

1. **Navigation and structure** — Header, Footer
2. **Inputs and controls** — Buttons, Toggle button, Checkbox, Radio, Switch, Text field, Text area, Number field, Time field, Date picker, Calendar, Tags
3. **Notifications and feedback** — Alert banner, Inline alert, Dialogs, Progress indicators, Tooltip
4. **Content** — Accordion group, Callout

Include component name, brief description of its purpose, and documentation URL for each entry.

> **Vue projects**: The component library is built in React (`@bcgov/design-system-react-components`). For Vue, advise reimplementing the design intent using BC Gov design tokens rather than importing React components directly.
